ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the employee is based */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the language proficiency of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee (YYYY-MM-DD) */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company (YYYY-MM-DD) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Official email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title or designation of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the employee belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for each employee (foreign key referencing the employees table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the metrics are associated with */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the employee in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the employee in cm */,
  "stress_level" INTEGER /* Stress level of the employee on a scale of 1 to 10 */,
  "covid_status" TEXT /* COVID-19 status of the employee (Yes/No) */,
  "alcohol_type" TEXT /* Type of alcohol consumed by the employee (e.g., Beer, Wine, Spirits, None) */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Performance marks or ratings of the employee (e.g., 1-100) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the health metrics were recorded (YYYY-MM-DD) */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure readings (systolic and diastolic) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the employee */,
  "cholesterol_level" REAL /* Cholesterol level of the employee */,
  "smoking_habits" TEXT /* Smoking habits of the employee (Yes/No) */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level of the employee (e.g., Sedentary, Lightly active, Moderately active, Very active) */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Sleep quality of the employee (e.g., Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the language (e.g., Basic, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who is a manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_diseases" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the disease */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "date_diagnosed" TEXT /* Date the disease was diagnosed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the disease (e.g., Active, Recovered, Deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "disease_id")
)
